title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering, not model selection, is the key differentiator for agentic AI coding in 2026. The harness comprises rules, skills, hooks, and orchestration layers around the model. Top engineers scale coding agents by orchestrating multiple focused sessions into reliable workflows rather than relying solely on model capabilities.
